name: Crimson Hexagonal Archive — Sovereign Asset Registry
description: Master index of 260 unique scholarly works (1,060 DOI records) from the Crimson Hexagonal Archive. All records were removed from Zenodo on 2026-06-19 without due process. This manifest maps original Zenodo DOIs to their restored locations on machinemediation.org.
